commit.message:
Fix calendar overlay stealing bell taps + calendar toggle

Root cause: position:absolute;inset:0;100%x100% date input was
extending beyond calendarBtn on iOS (overflow:hidden not reliably
clipping), intercepting taps on the bell and other nearby buttons.

Calendar:
- Input is now 1x1px, pointer-events:none - cannot intercept anything
- Button click handler: if filter active -> clear filter (toggle off)
  else -> showPicker() / .click() to open date picker programmatically
- Removed e.target tag-name checking (was always INPUT, never matched)

Bell:
- No longer intercepted by calendar input overlay
- Click always reaches notifBtn listener and calls subscribeToPush()

Modal:
- Dynamic title passed as param (blocked vs needs-install-as-PWA)
- notifModalTitle element replaces hardcoded heading

fix: include locked collateral UTXOs in UTXO set for balance tracking

The masternode returns locked (collateral) UTXOs with spendable:false via
listunspentmulti, but the wallet was discarding them. This caused:
- mn1 (Bronze 1k) and mn3 (Gold 100k) to show 'Tier pending' forever
- Locked balance to appear as only 10k (Silver) instead of 111k total
- reconcile_transactions_with_utxos() falsely seeing 'phantom' receives

Fix:
- Add spendable:bool field to Utxo (serde default true for DB-cached UTXOs)
- get_utxos() no longer filters out non-spendable UTXOs; spendable is set
  from the masternode's JSON response field
- service.rs: guard wallet_inner.add_utxo() and UTXO consolidation loop
  with if utxo.spendable so locked UTXOs cannot be selected for spending
- state.rs: utxo_total() now includes locked UTXOs (total = spendable +
  locked), which matches computed_balance() and fixes reconciliation
- UtxosUpdated handler sees locked UTXOs and backfills collateral_amount,
  which corrects tier detection for all masternode entries

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(NavPvt): add time/velocity/accuracy fields from NAV-PVT payload

Add the following fields to NavPvt (src/ubx/mod.rs), all parsed from
the 92-byte UBX-NAV-PVT payload per ICD UBX-21035062:

  t_acc_ns   (u32, offset 12) — time accuracy estimate (ns)
  nano       (i32, offset 16) — sub-second fraction (ns), valid when
                                 valid bit 2 (fullyResolved) is set
  flags      (u8,  offset 21) — fix status flags; bits 5-6 = carrSoln
  v_acc_mm   (u32, offset 44) — vertical accuracy estimate (mm)
  vel_n_mm_s (i32, offset 48) — NED north velocity (mm/s)
  vel_e_mm_s (i32, offset 52) — NED east velocity (mm/s)
  vel_d_mm_s (i32, offset 56) — NED down velocity (mm/s)
  s_acc_mm_s (u32, offset 68) — speed accuracy estimate (mm/s)

All existing fields are unchanged. Add test_parse_nav_pvt_new_fields
that builds a synthetic framed packet and asserts all new fields are
parsed correctly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix outdated tests: cross-platform paths, test isolation, and skip network-dependent tests (#6)

Several tests were broken or unreliable due to hardcoded Windows paths,
stale filename constants, shared mutable state between parallel tests,
and unconditional network calls.

## Skipped (network-dependent)
Tests making live HTTP calls to `f95zone.to` can never pass in CI or
offline environments — marked `[Fact(Skip = "requires network access to
f95zone.to")]`:
- `SearchF95QueryHandlerTests.SearchReturnsAFullPageWithNoSearchTerm`
- `GetF95PageSummaryDataQueryTests.GetsSummaryData`
- `GetBypassCookiesCommandHandlerTests.BypassSuccessful`

## Cross-platform path fixes
Replaced all hardcoded Windows paths (`D:\HGames`, `D:\Test`) with
`Path.GetTempPath()`-based paths:

```csharp
// Before
RootFolder = new GameLibraryFolder() { Path = @"D:\HGames" }

// After
_testRootFolder = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), "F95GameManagerTests", Guid.NewGuid().ToString());
RootFolder = new GameLibraryFolder() { Path = _testRootFolder }
```

## Stale filename constants
Tests were using hardcoded filenames that no longer matched the
constants, causing silent failures from leftover artefacts:
- `"settings.json"` → `SettingsConsts.SettingsFileName`
(`"GameManager.Settings.json"`)
- `"gameData.json"` → `SettingsConsts.GameDataFileName`
(`"GameManager.GameData.json"`)

## Test isolation
Multiple test classes shared the same output directory and folder names
(`testGameName`), causing intermittent `DirectoryNotFoundException`
under xUnit's parallel runner. Fixed by:
- Adding `IDisposable` with `Directory.Delete(..., recursive: true)`
cleanup to all tests that touch the filesystem
- Using `Guid.NewGuid()` scoped temp directories per test instance
- Renamed `GetLocalGameQueryHandlerTests` fixture folder to
`testGameName_GetQuery` to eliminate the conflict with
`SaveLocalGameCommandHandlerTests`
- `MoveExtraFoldersToNewGameFolderTest` now pre-creates a `GameFiles`
subdirectory so the post-condition `NotBeEmpty()` assertion is actually
testable

commit.message:
Add extensible auth middleware infrastructure

Extract CORS into middleware.py alongside new security and auth
middleware. Routes are classified as public (health, static, avatars,
root) or protected (everything else). The auth middleware calls a
pluggable authenticate callback for protected routes — currently a
no-op that allows all requests. Supply a TOTP/token/session callback
later to gate the API without changing route handlers.

Security middleware adds X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, and
Referrer-Policy headers to every response.

- New: src/vibes/middleware.py with is_public_route, create_auth_middleware,
  create_security_middleware, create_cors_middleware
- Refactor: app.py uses middleware module instead of inline CORS
- New: 12 tests covering route classification, auth gating, security
  headers, and CORS behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Phase 8.2: Implement clipboard and drag-and-drop support

Implemented full clipboard and drag-and-drop support for both Wayland and X11:

Wayland Data Device Protocol:
- wl_data_device_manager: Global factory for clipboard/DnD
- wl_data_device: Per-seat interface for clipboard operations
- wl_data_source: Represents data we're offering (copy/drag)
- wl_data_offer: Represents data being offered to us (paste/drop)
- MIME type negotiation (text/plain, text/html, etc.)
- File descriptor-based data transfer
- Drag-and-drop events (enter/leave/motion/drop)

X11 Selection Protocol:
- CLIPBOARD and PRIMARY selection atoms
- SetSelectionOwner for claiming selection ownership
- ConvertSelection for requesting clipboard data
- SelectionRequest/SelectionNotify/SelectionClear event handling
- TARGETS negotiation for MIME type discovery
- UTF8_STRING and TEXT encoding support

Implementation:
- Created internal/wayland/datadevice/ package (~440 LOC)
- Created internal/x11/selection/ package (~265 LOC)
- All 19 clipboard tests passing (10 Wayland + 9 X11)
- Demo binary: cmd/clipboard-demo/ demonstrating both protocols
- Zero critical regressions (18 improvements, 1 minor regression)

This completes Phase 8.2 per ROADMAP.md. Ready for Phase 8.3 (Window decorations).

commit.message:
fix(install.ps1): skip self-copy on Windows when cargo --root already targets BinDir

On Windows $BinDir is set to "$AppDir\bin", so $BinPath and $built both
resolve to the same path. Copy-Item source==dest throws in PowerShell,
causing Install-FromSource to fall into the catch block and return $false
even though the binary was installed successfully.

Guard both copy sites with ($built -ne $BinPath) so:
- Windows: copy is skipped (binary already in place)
- Linux/macOS: copy still runs (moves binary from $AppDir/bin to $HOME/.local/bin)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

     SW/UG 两个 bridge 重复手写 validation JSON 块的代码重复。

Initial AstroCalc library: astronomical calculations for .NET 9

Implements formulas from USNO Almanac for Computers, Meeus
'Astronomical Formulae for Calculators', Cambridge 'Textbook on
Spherical Astronomy', and Springer 'Fundamental Astronomy'.

- Time: JulianDate, SiderealTime
- Coordinates: Equatorial/Ecliptic/Horizontal/Galactic + transforms
- Corrections: Precession, Nutation, Aberration, Refraction, Parallax
- SolarSystem: SolarPosition, SunriseSunset, LunarPosition, PlanetaryPosition
- Phenomena: Eclipse predictions, PlanetaryPhenomena

83 xUnit tests verified against published almanac values and the
Mathcad/USNO worked example (MMT Observatory, 1988-01-15).
